name: CentyPack Batch Traceability
query:
SELECT
  bc.batch_no AS "Batch:Link/Batch:170",
  bc.company AS "Company:Link/Company:150",
  bc.customer AS "Batch Customer:Link/Customer:170",
  bc.farmer AS "Farmer:Link/Farmer:160",
  bc.farm_weight_kg AS "Farm Weight Kg:Float:120",
  bc.packhouse_weight_kg AS "Packhouse Weight Kg:Float:140",
  bc.variance_kg AS "Variance Kg:Float:110",
  bc.variance_status AS "Variance Status:Data:130",
  bc.packed_kg AS "Packed Kg:Float:110",
  bc.rejected_kg AS "Rejected Kg:Float:110",
  bc.returned_to_stock_kg AS "Returned Kg:Float:110",
  bc.available_kg AS "Available Kg:Float:110",
  psi.parent AS "Pack Session:Link/CentyPack Pack Session:220",
  ps.posting_date AS "Pack Date:Date:110",
  ps.packed_by AS "Packed By:Data:140",
  psi.item_code AS "Packed Item:Link/Item:180",
  psi.qty AS "Cartons:Float:90",
  COALESCE(psi.packed_weight_kg, 0) AS "Line Packed Kg:Float:120",
  COALESCE(psi.rejected_weight_kg, 0) AS "Line Rejected Kg:Float:130",
  COALESCE(psi.returned_to_stock_weight_kg, 0) AS "Line Returned Kg:Float:130",
  gi.parent AS "GDN:Link/CentyPack GDN:180",
  g.posting_date AS "Ship Date:Date:100",
  g.customer AS "Shipped Customer:Link/Customer:170",
  gi.item_code AS "Shipped Item:Link/Item:160",
  gi.qty AS "Shipped Qty:Float:100"
FROM `tabCentyPack Batch Control` bc
LEFT JOIN `tabCentyPack Pack Item` psi ON psi.batch_no = bc.batch_no
LEFT JOIN `tabCentyPack Pack Session` ps ON ps.name = psi.parent AND psi.parenttype = 'CentyPack Pack Session'
LEFT JOIN `tabCentyPack GDN Item` gi ON gi.batch_no = bc.batch_no
LEFT JOIN `tabCentyPack GDN` g ON g.name = gi.parent AND gi.parenttype = 'CentyPack GDN'
WHERE (%(batch_no)s IS NULL OR %(batch_no)s = '' OR bc.batch_no = %(batch_no)s)
  AND (%(customer)s IS NULL OR %(customer)s = '' OR bc.customer = %(customer)s OR g.customer = %(customer)s)
  AND (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR %(from_date)s = '' OR ps.posting_date >= %(from_date)s OR g.posting_date >= %(from_date)s)
  AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR %(to_date)s = '' OR ps.posting_date <= %(to_date)s OR g.posting_date <= %(to_date)s)
ORDER BY bc.batch_no DESC, ps.posting_date DESC, g.posting_date DESC
